历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 25631 → 30557 → 31134 → 34819 → 33985, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In the recent 3 years, it moved from 31134 to 33985, a cumulative backward shift of about 2851 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 33985, slightly recovered (forward by 834) compared to 2024, but still around 34,000. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 89 in 2021, 90 in 2022, 89 in 2023, 95 in 2024, and 95 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 95, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion to alleviate pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 84th (overall, comparable to North China Electric Power University). In recent years, its ranking has been stable in the 75–84 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin has not entered the national top 100, and attention on short video platforms is average, with no abnormal signals in application heat. Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-) are national-level advantageous disciplines, with distinctive characteristics in the electric power industry, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as 'high-heat recommendation', and Energy and Power category as 'recommended'. Related engineering majors continue to have high social heat. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.5% compared to 2025 (about 358,000). By historical proportion, it is estimated that there are about 379,000 Physics Category candidates, with significantly intensified competition. The Physics Category undergraduate batch scores from 2021 to 2025 were 417 → 429 → 448 → 462 → 463, showing a gradual upward trend year by year, reflecting an overall increase in competition intensity. The school is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a local university in Jiangsu Province, with no enrollment preference for this province. The enrollment plan in Jiangsu Province accounts for a very small proportion, and cross-province application requires consideration of regional adaptation costs.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the number of candidates in Jiangsu Province (Physics Category increase of about 45.5%), and the sustained high heat of electrical majors, competition pressure has clearly risen. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 33985. The predicted minimum ranking is about 34285, with a range of 33785–34785.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Hunan Normal University recruits independently for medical programs in Liaoning Province. The minimum admission ranking in 2021 was 22,764 (planned enrollment of 4), dropped to 23,817 in 2023 (planned enrollment expanded to 8), continued to decline to 25,187 in 2024 (planned enrollment of 8), and rebounded significantly to 20,146 in 2025 (planned enrollment of 8). Over four years, the rankings showed a V-shaped trend of first declining and then rising, with a rebound of 5,031 places in 2025. The enrollment plan for 2026 remains at 8, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, but recent years have seen large fluctuations in rankings, reflecting cyclical adjustments in candidate application enthusiasm.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a Project 211 university and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, and is a normal university. Its medical department (formerly the Medical College) has a certain influence within the province. Although not a traditional strong medical school, relying on the 211 platform and the advantages of a comprehensive university, medical programs still hold some appeal for Liaoning candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the national application enthusiasm for medical programs has been continuously rising, with clinical medicine, pharmacy, and preventive medicine being popular directions. Hunan Normal University has a small enrollment scale for medical programs in Liaoning Province (only 8 students), with a streamlined program setup, and clinical medicine (five-year system) as the core program. Cross-province application to medical schools in Hunan has some impact on Liaoning candidates due to geographical factors, but the geographical barriers for medical programs are relatively low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical programs in Liaoning Province in 2026 is predicted to be 20,446, a slight decrease of 300 places (harder to enter) compared to 2025 (20,146), mainly due to natural market correction after the significant rebound in 2025. The fluctuation range is 20,241 to 20,651. It is recommended that candidates plan their applications reasonably within this range.
